task: Implements the 'Personalize <-> Refine' direction chosen from a series of Artifact mockups and refined live with the user: nothing selected shows a full Personalize zone (Rule 4 -- adding a new personal layer to the page); the instant something is selected, Personalize collapses to a one-line strip and Refine (Rule 3, still 100% CardDesigner's own untouched #card-tab markup) expands to fill the room, with a small Status pill (Rule 2) always on top. Anything Personalize's new '+ Add Something' menu creates (Stickers/Decorations/Shape, all the same SceneEngine.addSticker capability filtered to a different StickerLibrary category) is an ordinary owner:'story' render-tree object, landing in Object Strip automatically -- the literal Rule 4 -> Rule 3 loop, zero new plumbing. Photo reuses the existing Add/Replace Artwork flow against the first open Place; Note/Doodle/Voice are honest, disabled Coming Soon rows since SceneEngine has no supporting capability for any of them today. Background Colour/Change Look/Caption reuse their pre-existing field-building bodies verbatim, now behind inline-expand accordion tiles instead of always-rendered. Verified via two new Playwright suites (36 assertions) plus full regression across the existing 57-script Creator/Builder/Card-Platform suite (one script updated for this sprint's own intentional restructuring, 5 unrelated pre-existing failures confirmed via git stash) and both goldenBuild.js suites, zero console errors. Confined to js/contextPanel.js, js/stickerStudio.js, css/style.css -- no Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder change.
